class.description: Jump Point Search (JPS) global planner. An optimal speed-up of 8-connected grid A* on uniform-cost grids: it jumps over symmetric path segments and pushes only jump points onto the open list, returning the same optimal path as A* while expanding far fewer nodes. Treats the costmap as a binary free/blocked grid (cells at or above lethal_threshold are obstacles). Classical (non-learned) and not part of upstream Nav2. Throws NoValidPathCouldBeFound if no path is found.
